agency: NYC Mayor's Office of Immigrant Affairs
description: Free municipal identification card available to all NYC residents age 10+. Accepted as ID for city services, building access, and more. Includes benefits like free museum memberships.

eligibility.notes: No income test. No immigration status requirement. Must prove NYC residency and identity. Ages 10-13 must apply with a parent/guardian.

apply_in_person: Visit an IDNYC enrollment center. Locations: https://www.nyc.gov/site/idnyc/card/enrollment-centers.page
how_to_apply: Visit an IDNYC enrollment center with proof of identity and NYC residency. The card is free.
